name: LookupRxPDU
title: LookupRxPDU
description: Searches for the specified rx PDU. The path must be complete including namespaces and endpoint(s):
You can downcast the result to a concrete type, see the example.
return: The Rx PDU. An uninitialized object if the PDU is not found, which will also be reported in the Write Window or as an error in test system (if the function is called in a test routine).
